name: Popover

variants.name: non_modal
variants.description: Stays open when user interacts with background. Moves with anchor on scroll. Sticks to screen edge if anchor scrolls out of view.
variants.close_behaviour: Close button or re-clicking the trigger

variants.name: modal
variants.description: Closes when user clicks outside or scrolls the page.
variants.close_behaviour: Click outside, scroll, or close button

show_nubbin.note: Arrow pointing to the trigger element

trigger.note: The UI element that triggers the popover

open_on_load.note: For feature callouts shown on page load

scroll_behaviour.modal: Closes automatically when user scrolls or interacts with background
scroll_behaviour.non_modal: Stays open and moves with anchor. Sticks to screen edge if anchor scrolls out of view.
scroll_behaviour.large_content: Close button remains sticky at top. Content below scrolls.

usage_rules.rule: Only one popover at a time
Do not use for critical information
usage_rules.detail: Popovers are not for critical messages. Use Modal or a notification component (Banner, Toast) instead.
Do not make the popover too large or overly descriptive. Keep headline and body clear and brief.
If the trigger is an icon-only button, ensure a tooltip is also present to explain the trigger itself.
Use modal variant when the popover should dismiss on scroll. Use non-modal when it should follow the anchor.

accessibility.aria_modal: true for modal variant, false for non-modal

confidence_blockers: If ticket uses popover for a critical error or alert message, flag and suggest Modal or Banner.
If ticket requests multiple simultaneous popovers, flag.
If ticket does not specify modal vs non_modal variant, ask — scroll behaviour differs significantly.

embedding_text: Popover component. Elevated contextual panel showing detailed information or feature callout. Two variants: non-modal follows anchor on scroll, modal closes on scroll or background click. Positions: right left top bottom corner. Has headline body nubbin close button actions image. One at a time. Not for critical messages. Fixed width content-dependent height.
